posts.author: Mazeflare
posts.body: The legend Danielle Misteli is back, if she gets the sub this time it would be hillarious, and by the way, Sara (the girl she beat) is fighting Czyżewska in KSW for the BW title.And you know what would be even cooler for Europe, Czyżewska vs Szabová in a cross-promotion, who's the best in Europe. * Edited at 03.19.2026, 12:39 PM ET *
